'''Bex''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and a [[HAVw A5 Juggernaut|HAV/w A5 Juggernaut]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]]. He was killed by [[Amani/Legends|Amanin]] raiders on [[Maridun/Legends|Maridun]] when they shot though the [[HAVw A5 Juggernaut]]'s pilot cockpit window.

{{Char-stub}}

*[[Empire 16|''Empire'' 16]] {{1st}}
*[[Empire 17|''Empire'' 17]]
